RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED 8-5-14 TO PLAINTIFF. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD>"
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, LESBIA ELIZABETH MOLINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, LESBIA ELIZABETH MOLINA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BUT SHE ARRIVED LATE AT 4:15PM BY THEN CASE HAD BEEN DISMISSED AND SIGNED BY JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
